title: Single Cell Browser
body: Single cell RNA sequencing datasets from AMP-CMD (common metabolic disease) were aggregated into pseudobulk expression profiles using as input cell-level counts and metadata (disease status, tissue, cell type, donor). Counts were summed for each donor × cell type × tissue × condition and output as pseudobulk expression profiles, from which lowly-expressed genes and poorly represented samples were removed. Principal component analyses were conducted on the filtered pseudobulk expression data and metadata in order to reduce dimensionality to visualize sample clustering by tissue, cell type, or disease status.
